included.description: Large Pilot Flying J travel center in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster at I-40 Exit 280 (I-40/I-55 corridor). Approx. 225 truck parking spots (33 reserved/paid), showers, public laundry, CAT scale, DEF lanes, game room, premium WiFi; Southern Tire Mart and Blue Beacon on site.

24-hour Pilot travel center on Martin Luther King Jr Dr in the West Memphis cluster (directory sources list I-40 Exit 280; I-40/I-55 corridor). About 150 truck parking spots (17 reserved/paid), 11 showers, CAT scale, laundry, deli/fast food, trucker store and lounge, WiFi.

Full-service Petro (TravelCenters of America) stopping center at I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4. Approx. 280 truck parking spots (63 reserved/paid), 17 showers, Iron Skillet restaurant, laundry, scale, TA Truck Service shop with 6 bays, driver lounge, gym, barber, WiFi.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop in the West Memphis cluster; directory sources list I-40 Exit 280 (I-40/I-55 corridor, MLK Dr). About 111 truck parking spots, 10 showers, CAT scale, deli/fast food, bulk DEF, lighted paved lot, WiFi.

Full-service TA travel center at I-40 Exit 260 (Earle/Crawfordsville area). Large truck lot with Reserve-It paid parking (sources report 137-170 spaces), 9 showers, CAT scale, truck wash, TA Truck Service shop with 6 bays, laundry, Pizza Hut Express/Taco Bell Express/Burger King, game room, pet area.

Independent travel center (Valero-branded fuel) at I-40 Exit 260 near Earle, across Highway 149 from TA Earle. Truck parking, deli/restaurant, laundry, scales, travel store and truck wash services per truck-stop directories.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-40 Exit 233 (Hwy 261, Palestine). 88 truck parking spots, 5 showers, CAT scale, 2-bay Love's Truck Care tire/light-mechanical service, Chester's Fried Chicken and Subway, RV dump, bulk DEF, WiFi.

Small 24-hour fuel stop/convenience store with truck parking at I-40 Exit 256 (Hwy 75, Heth). Directories report about 15 parking spaces, 5 diesel lanes, deli and showers, with overnight parking permitted.
Independent 24-hour truck stop (76/Sunoco-branded fuel) at I-40 Exit 247 (AR-38 E toward Widener/Hughes). Diesel, convenience store, food and restrooms; the only service listed at this exit.

included.business_name: Arkansas Welcome Center at West Memphis
included.description: Official ARDOT-listed welcome center/rest area on I-40 westbound at mile marker 278 in West Memphis, the first Arkansas stop after crossing the Mississippi River. Separate truck and passenger parking, 24/7 restrooms, water, picnic tables, WiFi and travel information.

included.business_name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center #607
included.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale located at the Flying J Travel Center, I-40 Exit 280, West Memphis.

included.business_name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #429
included.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale located at Pilot Travel Center #429 in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster (I-40 Exit 280 per directory sources).

included.business_name: CAT Scale at Petro Stopping Center #311
included.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4, West Memphis.

included.business_name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #450
included.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at Love's Travel Stop #450, West Memphis (I-40 Exit 280 per directory sources).
CAT Scale certified truck scale at the TA Earle travel center, I-40 Exit 260.

included.business_name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #275
included.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale at Love's Travel Stop #275, I-40 Exit 233, Palestine.

Commercial truck tire dealer and service center on the I-40 north service road in West Memphis. New and retread commercial tires, 24/7 roadside tire service, air/hydraulic brake work, DOT inspections, wheel balancing and fleet inspections.

included.business_name: Southern Tire Mart at Pilot Flying J
included.description: Southern Tire Mart commercial tire shop located on-site at the Flying J Travel Center, I-40 Exit 280, West Memphis. Truck tire sales, repair and replacement for drivers using the Flying J complex.

24-hour Love's Speedco truck lube and tire shop on Petro Rd in the West Memphis truck-stop cluster. Commercial tire sales and repair, oil changes, light mechanical work and emergency roadside assistance.

Goodyear commercial truck tire and service center adjacent to Love's Travel Stop on Martin Luther King Dr in the West Memphis I-40/I-55 truck-stop cluster. Commercial tire sales, repair and fleet service.

included.business_name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of West Memphis (Flying J)
included.description: 24-hour Blue Beacon truck wash located by the Flying J Travel Center at I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4 in West Memphis. Exterior washes, trailer washouts and related services.

included.business_name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (Petro West Memphis)
included.description: Blue Beacon truck wash (listed as Blue Beacon of Memphis) located at the Petro Stopping Center complex on Petro Dr/Rd, West Memphis. Exterior truck and trailer washes.

Independent hand truck wash in the Petro Rd truck-stop area of West Memphis. Hand washes, wheel and aluminum polishing, interior detail, hopper/dry van/end dump washouts, plus an on-site CB shop and radio repair.

included.business_name: Comfort Suites West Memphis I-40 I-55
included.description: Hotel at the I-40/I-55 junction in West Memphis with explicitly advertised free truck, bus and RV parking. Free hot breakfast, WiFi, indoor pool, fitness center and guest laundry.

included.business_name: Days Inn by Wyndham Forrest City
included.description: Budget hotel at I-40 Exit 241 in Forrest City with explicitly advertised free RV/bus/truck parking for vehicles of all sizes. Seasonal outdoor pool and free self parking.

included.business_name: TA Truck Service - Petro West Memphis
included.description: Fixed TA Truck Service repair facility with 6 truck service bays at the Petro Stopping Center, I-40 Exit 280 / I-55 Exit 4, West Memphis. Light mechanical, oil changes, tires and DOT-level maintenance.

Fixed TA Truck Service shop with 6 service bays at the TA Earle travel center, I-40 Exit 260. Truck alignment, DOT inspections, brake, HVAC and electrical service, J-PRO diagnostics, reefer services and road service dispatch.

ASE-certified independent diesel truck repair shop in West Memphis with a fixed facility on Balfour Rd; offers diesel engine repair, brake repair and 24-hour roadside assistance/towing dispatch from the shop.

held.business_name: Arkansas Highway Police Weigh Station - I-40 Eastbound (Lehi / West Memphis)
held.description: AHP District 5 (Crittenden County) weigh station on I-40 eastbound near Lehi at approx. mile marker 273.5-274, serving traffic approaching West Memphis. HELD: confirmed by official ARDOT AHP weigh station map, but no civic street address available from official sources (mailing address is PO Box 2126, West Memphis, AR 72303).

held.business_name: Arkansas Highway Police Weigh Station - I-40 Westbound (Riverside / West Memphis)
held.description: AHP District 5 (Crittenden County) I-40 westbound weigh station (listed as Riverside) serving trucks entering Arkansas from Memphis. HELD: appears on official ARDOT AHP weigh station material, but no civic street address or confirmed mile marker available from official sources.

held.business_name: Forrest City Rest Area - I-40 Eastbound (MM 235)
held.description: State rest area on I-40 eastbound at mile marker 235 near Forrest City with separate truck parking, restrooms, water and picnic tables. HELD: listed in the official ARDOT welcome centers/rest areas PDF, but no civic street address is published by official sources.

held.business_name: Forrest City Rest Area - I-40 Westbound (MM 242.6)
held.description: State rest area on I-40 westbound at mile marker 242.6 near Forrest City with RV/truck parking, restrooms and vending. HELD: listed in the official ARDOT welcome centers/rest areas PDF, but no civic street address is published by official sources.

Small independent truck stop at I-40 Exit 271 on US-70 near Lehi with about 25 truck parking spaces, deli/restaurant, trucker lounge and travel store. HELD: sources conflict on current branding (PJ's Country Store vs Jump Stop/Valero) and on city/ZIP (Lehi/Marion 72364 vs Proctor 72376); current operating status not confirmed by two consistent sources.

Hotel on the I-40 service road in West Memphis. HELD: truck parking is claimed only by one source (Expedia lists RV/bus/truck parking); no second explicit truck-parking confirmation found, and sources conflict on E Service Rd vs S Service Rd address.

Extended-stay motel on the I-40 west service road advertising truck parking. HELD: truck-parking confirmation comes only from the operator's own G6 Hospitality sites (studio6.com/motel6.com); no independent second source found.

Motel on the I-40/I-55 service road with bus and truck parking mentioned by a booking site. HELD: only one source explicitly confirms truck parking, and listings suggest the property may have rebranded (some OTA pages now show Rodeway Inn West Memphis at this location).

Motel near the I-40/I-55 convergence that markets itself as convenient for bus and truck travelers. HELD: no explicit truck-parking amenity confirmation found from any source, and no verified street address collected.

excluded.business_name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Memphis (Lamar Ave)
excluded.description: EXCLUDED: located in Memphis, Tennessee, across the Mississippi River; covered by the TN batch, not the I-40 Arkansas exits 233-284 segment.
EXCLUDED: paid secure truck parking facility located in Memphis, Tennessee (about 12 miles east of West Memphis); belongs to the TN batch.
EXCLUDED: tank wash facility located in Memphis, Tennessee; covered by the TN batch.
